threads.subject: Re: EverPass + AccuWeather Agreement
threads.snippet: Hi Ryan, My legal team told me that the Docusign was sent to Alex, but I was not on the email personally. I asked the Legal team to double check. I will keep you posted. Looking forward to getting this signed and on to launching. Thanks! -Pat

threads.subject: Michael Lynch sent you "Draft Follow Up Letter to DIRECTV re Audit v4"
threads.snippet: Hi all: Attached please find a draft letter along the lines we discussed.  Please send us comments when you have chance or we can just discuss on Tuesday. Thanks. MICHAEL C. LYNCH Chair, Litigation Practice Group Kelley Drye & Warren LLP

threads.subject: StreamTv
threads.snippet: Hi Ryan, Glad we are close to the finish line on our agreement.  I see you plan to be at StreamTV in Denver next month.  I will be there and would love to find time to meet in person.  Please let me know if you have some avails. Thank you. Johanna

threads.subject: Re: NBA Term Sheet - Privileged and Confidential
threads.snippet: Yep, co-lo fees are already contemplated in NBA LP costs. On another note, I noticed in the agreement that we (EverPass) own 42% of ad inventory for each game (and the ads need to be programmatic). I don't think we've done programmatic advertising, so
